title: Spear Enchant Indicator - Lunge and Sharpness
description: Changes the Spear's colour based on Lunge and Sharpness
body:
Spear Enchant Indicator is a simple resource pack that changes spear visuals based on enchantments in vanilla Minecraft, with no mods required. ---

***

--- ## Features - Spear visuals change based on enchantments - Clear Sharpness, Lunge, and Hybrid states - Easy to read during PvP and survival combat - Fully vanilla-compatible --- ## Why Spear Enchant Indicator? Minecraft combat is fast, and checking tooltips mid-fight isn’t practical. This pack makes spears instantly readable so you can tell how they’re built just by looking at them. --- ## Overview ### Screenshots | Sharpness | Lunge | Hybrid | |----------|------|--------| | | | | | [View Full Size](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b7ff0d31293b6b2e0f6c04f755d3e28e073ea4a.jpeg) | [View Full Size](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e092e64c82f4508dc476456580953ef90365d967.jpeg) | [View Full Size](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38857a70a748961a048bed08d52169fde660baf2.jpeg) | --- ### Enchantments | Sharpness | Lunge | Hybrid | |----------|------|--------| | | | | - **Sharpness:** Spears with any level of Sharpness - **Lunge:** Spears with any level of Lunge - **Hybrid:** Spears with both Lunge and Sharpness --- ## Technical ### Requirements | Pack Version | Minecraft Version | Forge | Fabric | Vanilla | |--------------|------------------|--------|--------|---------| | 1.x | 1.21.11+ | ✔ Supported | ✔ Supported | ✔ Supported | --- ### Installation 1. Download the ZIP file 2. Place it in your Minecraft `resourcepacks` folder 3. Enable it from the Resource Pack menu --- ### Compatibility - Works in vanilla Minecraft - Compatible with modern resource pack systems (1.21.11+) - May conflict with packs that modify spear models or textures --- ### Tags spear indicator, lunge spear, sharpness spear, hybrid spear, spear enchant, pvp spear, lunge sharpness indicator, spear pvp, enchantment indicator, vanilla spear, spear sharpness, spear lunge, sharpness indicator, lunge indicator, pvp indicator, spear enchantments, pvp utility, vanilla pvp, spear visibility, enchant visibility, lunge, sharpness, spear --- ### License All Rights Reserved
